site.title: Wenhao Hua
site.description: Personal homepage and research blog for Wenhao Hua.
site.author: Wenhao Hua

hero.headline: Research notes, project logs, and a clearer public profile.
hero.summary: I am an undergraduate student at Jilin University. This site is where I collect what I am learning around time series analysis, large language models, and memory-oriented methods.
panelItems: Time series analysis and long-horizon modeling
Large language models for research workflows
A lightweight writing workflow powered by Markdown

about.title: A simple academic homepage that can keep growing
about.copy: Instead of a single static profile card, this site is meant to accumulate context over time.
about.lead: I am an undergraduate student at Jilin University with interests in time series analysis, large language models, and memory-centered modeling ideas.
about.body: The goal of this homepage is to give me one place to publish notes, explain what I am working on, and keep a public trail of projects and reading. As the work becomes more concrete, the site can expand without changing the underlying structure.

research.title: Research themes I want to keep pushing
research.copy: These are not fixed claims about expertise. They are the areas this homepage will organize around.

items.title: Time Series Learning
items.body: Forecasting, representation learning, and robust modeling for structured temporal signals.

items.title: LLM-Centered Systems
items.body: How large language models can support reasoning, tooling, and research-oriented workflows.

items.title: Memory as Infrastructure
items.body: Retrieval, compression, and memory-bank style mechanisms for longer context and better decisions.

building.title: What this site will hold
building.copy: The homepage is designed as an archive, not only as a landing page.

items.label: Writing
items.title: Research notes and reflections
items.body: Short posts for reading notes, implementation ideas, and progress summaries.

items.label: Profile
items.title: A stable public introduction
items.body: A homepage that can describe interests, contact details, and evolving work without redesigning everything.

items.label: Code
items.title: GitHub-first publishing workflow
items.body: Markdown sources and generated static files live in the same repository for easy GitHub Pages deployment.

contact.title: Find me online
contact.copy: The fastest way to understand what this site is becoming is to read the writing section below and then jump to GitHub.
